description_long: This sconce features a conical black metal shade with a slightly flared base, designed to direct light downward. The shade is attached to a cylindrical neck, which is connected to a rectangular mounting bracket, likely for installation on a ceiling or track system. A subtle metallic or gray band encircles the upper portion of the shade, adding a touch of contrast to the otherwise monochromatic design. The mounting bracket appears robust and industrial, suggesting durability and secure attachment. The overall form is sleek and functional, with clean lines and a modern aesthetic. The materials and finish suggest it is intended for use in contemporary urban environments, such as commercial spaces, garages, or modern residential settings.
description: A modern black conical sconce with a metallic accent band and a sturdy rectangular mounting bracket, designed for ceiling or track installation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide conical shade, metallic accent band, and the rectangular mounting bracket above.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the depth of the shade and the cylindrical neck connecting to the bracket.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the conical shade and the full width of the mounting bracket.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the profile of the conical shade and the vertical alignment of the mounting bracket.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and a functional industrial influence. The conical shade and metallic accent band contribute to its contemporary urban style.
